name: Regsvr32 Anomalous Activity Detected
description: Suspicious execution patterns of regsvr32.exe detected, potentially indicating abuse for malicious code execution, defense evasion, or persistence.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when regsvr32.exe activity was detected.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the regsvr32.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the regsvr32.exe process.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched regsvr32.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the regsvr32.exe process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
